description: Extract geometric and mass properties from the T8 lead screw housing bracket model (/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/T8_housing_bracket.FCStd) in FreeCAD. Determine the volume (mm³), surface area (mm²), bounding box dimensions (X, Y, Z in mm), and center of mass (X, Y, Z in mm). Calculate the mass in grams based on a density of 0.0027 g/mm³ (Aluminum 6061). Save the results to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/mass_report.json using the following keys: 'volume_mm3', 'surface_area_mm2', 'bounding_box_x_mm', 'bounding_box_y_mm', 'bounding_box_z_mm', 'center_of_mass_x_mm', 'center_of_mass_y_mm', 'center_of_mass_z_mm', and 'mass_grams'.
